extraction.one_line_summary: CICCONI Giulio won mountaintop finish at Vall de Núria after CHAVEZ Jhonatan attacked solo early on final climb but was caught with 500m remaining.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain Victorious set infernal pace for LANDER entire climb, accounting for big names, but leader couldn't finish fourth.
CHAVEZ attacked well before summit, descended technical corners at 14% grades solo, caught only final 500m.
EVENEPOEL went wide final corner entering plateau, allowing CICCONI and ROGLIČ to cut inside for sprint advantage.

rider_signals.CHAVEZ Jhonatan: positive: attacked early on Vall de Núria, descended technical sections aggressively solo, caught only in final 500m sprint
rider_signals.LANDER Michael: negative: entire Bahrain team worked for him setting infernal pace that shed top riders, but he finished fourth behind podium
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Ecuadorian Champion went backwards on Vall de Núria despite teammate Higuita attacking
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: looked nervous in finale, tactical error going wide on final corner cost him potential stage win
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: amazing fifth-place finish at 27 seconds, unexpected strength for stage type
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: Colombian Champion attacked when teammate Carapaz struggled, showing inverted team hierarchy
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: sensational domestique work for Pogačar on Vall de Núria climb
